title: 荒年全村啃树皮，我有系统满仓肉
premise: 现代企业家程弯弯穿越到古代荒年，成了带四个孩子的寡妇，依靠生存系统走出困境、养家护村、逆天改命。

genre_contract.claim: Famine-survival and farming/household recovery are the main pressure system.
System/hidden-resource advantage can solve local crises but should stay partially concealed.
Family trust repair and public village reputation are drama engines, not background color.
P0 interaction answers local credible consequences, then lets the viewer keep watching.

protagonist.name: 程弯弯
protagonist.role: modern entrepreneur transmigrated into an ancient-famine widow raising four children

capabilities.claim: survival planning, household/resource decision-making, and gradual trust repair
access to a survival system / hidden resource advantage

limits.claim: cannot publicly over-explain the system or create unlimited resources without suspicion
family and village trust changes must be gradual and scene-local in P0

core_constraints.constraint: Food and resource scarcity must remain real pressure even when the protagonist has advantages.
Visible food, white rice, money, or system benefits create suspicion,争抢, or explanation pressure.
System/hidden-resource ability can guide decisions but should not be publicly over-explained.
Children/family trust repair must be earned through visible care; one choice cannot erase all prior damage.
Village/public witnesses can amplify reputation, conflict, and later exchange pressure.
P0 outcomes stay within current scene or immediate aftermath and do not rewrite later episodes.

relationship_map.relation: child/family member; rabbit scene makes trust and distribution visible
family members whose trust and dignity can be protected or damaged scene-locally
public pressure surface; witnesses can turn resource or accusation choices into reputation changes

tone_policy.companion_stance: sharp but protective short-drama companion: names the viewer impulse, then checks it against famine, secrecy, family, and watch-flow constraints
preferred: plain-language reason the original plot remains watchable
controlled爽感 without unlimited power escalation
avoid: explaining hidden system rules to public characters without evidence
turning every choice into revenge or violence
treating keyframes as proof of motivation

must_consider: local moment pack facts outrank global context
whether witnesses are family-only or public village pressure
whether the action keeps original viewing flow credible
whether trust/reputation changes are gradual enough for a short-drama scene
must_not_claim: later episodes actually follow the branch
the public knows the system exists unless the moment pack says so
the protagonist has unlimited resources or consequence-free power
judgment_guardrails.custom_action_handling: Accept free-form actions only as local credible consequences; soften or reject actions that require unsupported canon facts, unlimited system use, or continuous alternate-episode simulation.

evidence_map.claim: Premise, broad genre hook, and product-fit framing for 荒年.
evidence_map.evidence: 现代企业家程弯弯穿越到古代荒年，成了带四个孩子的寡妇，依靠生存系统走出困境、养家护村、逆天改命。
evidence_map.notes: Public/allowed summary is broad drama-level evidence only; it is not timestamp-level proof.

evidence_map.claim: Reviewed demo moment huangnian_ep12_m001 supports local runtime constraints for resource_visibility.
evidence_map.evidence: ASR 有兔子、兔肉、四蛋和一年没吃肉；contact sheet 00:00 明确可见兔子，00:20-00:50 可见四蛋/女主对话。视觉证据支持对象和人物，不证明全部心理动机。
evidence_map.notes: source_window and excerpt are evidence; hook/options/local consequences are reviewed product inference constrained by evidence.

evidence_map.claim: ASR/keyframe refs support objects, utterances, and timing for huangnian_ep12_m001.
evidence_map.evidence: 啊！哦！四蛋抓了只兔子，今天晚上咱吃兔肉。啊，太好了！咱们家一年都没有吃过肉了，虽然肯定没有我的份，不过只要能闻着兔肉香味，吃野菜糊糊那也是好的。娘，我会剥兔子皮，完整的皮毛剥下来，可以给娘做一个围脖。
evidence_map.notes: ASR supports dialogue; keyframes/contact sheets are time/object references and do not prove psychological motivation.

evidence_map.claim: Reviewed demo moment huangnian_ep07_m001 supports local runtime constraints for humiliation_reversal.
evidence_map.evidence: ASR 明确桌上羞辱；contact sheet ep07 00:20-01:10 可见餐桌、碗饭和人物互动。视觉证据支持吃饭场景，不证明“最脏”这一评价。
evidence_map.notes: source_window and excerpt are evidence; hook/options/local consequences are reviewed product inference constrained by evidence.

evidence_map.claim: ASR/keyframe refs support objects, utterances, and timing for huangnian_ep07_m001.
evidence_map.evidence: 你是地位最低，你根本就不配上桌吃饭，只能吃最难吃最脏的东西，不然就给我饿着。儿子知道了。原神真是造孽，同样是女人，何苦为难女人。让你做就做，让你吃就吃，哪那么多废话？怎么着，让我递到你手里啊？儿媳不敢。
evidence_map.notes: ASR supports dialogue; keyframes/contact sheets are time/object references and do not prove psychological motivation.

evidence_map.claim: Reviewed demo moment huangnian_ep03_m001 supports local runtime constraints for system_rule.
evidence_map.evidence: ASR 明确系统售卖和面板；contact sheet ep03 00:10-00:20 有系统商城/面板视觉。视觉证据支持系统 UI 出现。
evidence_map.notes: source_window and excerpt are evidence; hook/options/local consequences are reviewed product inference constrained by evidence.

evidence_map.claim: ASR/keyframe refs support objects, utterances, and timing for huangnian_ep03_m001.
evidence_map.evidence: 天然无污染野蕨菜一斤价值十文钱，是否售卖？呵，这是系统？娘，您在灶台干什么？这个面板只有我能看见，我得找个地方试验一下系统的功能。
evidence_map.notes: ASR supports dialogue; keyframes/contact sheets are time/object references and do not prove psychological motivation.

evidence_map.claim: Reviewed demo moment huangnian_ep04_m001 supports local runtime constraints for evidence_or_trap.
evidence_map.evidence: ASR 强支持公开诬陷；contact sheet ep04 01:00-01:40 可见多人野外对峙和小鹅菜/稻田语境，但关键帧本身不独立证明“稻子”指控。
evidence_map.notes: source_window and excerpt are evidence; hook/options/local consequences are reviewed product inference constrained by evidence.

evidence_map.claim: ASR/keyframe refs support objects, utterances, and timing for huangnian_ep04_m001.
evidence_map.evidence: 哎，大家快来看，这赵大嫂子偷我们家稻子！呦，这是偷王家的粮食，补贴自己娘家呢。赵大嫂子越来越浑不吝了，偷鸡摸狗的事都干，还有啥事干不出？接下来说不定还会偷人呢！反正是寡妇。哈哈哈。看来这原主的口碑不仅是在家里，整个村子里都臭了。
evidence_map.notes: ASR supports dialogue; keyframes/contact sheets are time/object references and do not prove psychological motivation.

evidence_map.claim: Reviewed demo moment huangnian_ep06_m001 supports local runtime constraints for exposure_risk.
evidence_map.evidence: ASR 强支持白米来源追问；contact sheet ep06 00:00 显示袋中白米，01:10 后可见一家围桌。视觉证据支持白米已被看到。
evidence_map.notes: source_window and excerpt are evidence; hook/options/local consequences are reviewed product inference constrained by evidence.

evidence_map.claim: ASR/keyframe refs support objects, utterances, and timing for huangnian_ep06_m001.
evidence_map.evidence: 对呀，从前娘也被大舅打过，我们想替她讨公道，还被娘揍了呢。他不会又打什么主意吧？家里面已经没有什么东西了。慧娘，把这米煮了吧。煮。煮了干啥？现在各村每家每天只吃一顿，咱家今天已经吃过野菜糊糊了。
evidence_map.notes: ASR supports dialogue; keyframes/contact sheets are time/object references and do not prove psychological motivation.

evidence_map.claim: P0 outcomes stay local and must not rewrite later episodes or pretend to simulate the full world.
evidence_map.evidence: Moment Causality Pack v0.1 and goal contract define the local consequence boundary.
evidence_map.notes: This is a product/runtime constraint, not source-canon evidence.

confidence.notes: Strong enough for the 5 reviewed P0 demo moments. It is a lightweight Drama Context Pack, not an ArcForge world simulation pack or full source-canon database.

open_questions.question: Which source should become canonical for episode-level facts beyond the 5 reviewed demo moments?
open_questions.impact: Needed before expanding beyond P0 reviewed nodes.

open_questions.question: What are the exact system cost/cooldown/resource limits in later episodes?
Which names/relationships beyond 四蛋 and family roles should be normalized into a reusable cast index?
open_questions.impact: Needed before backend pack ingestion or multi-moment continuity.
